mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.user_id AS userId, b.category_id AS categoryId, b.title, b.content, b.cover_img AS coverImg, b.summary, b.views, b.likes, b.status, b.is_top AS isTop, b.is_featured AS isFeatured, b.created_at AS createdAt, b.updated_at AS updatedAt, c.name AS categoryName, COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username) AS authorName FROM t_blog b LEFT JOIN t_category c ON b.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_user u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT b.id, b.user_id AS userId, b.category_id AS categoryId, b.title, b.cover_img AS coverImg, b.summary, b.views, b.likes, b.status, b.is_top AS isTop, b.is_featured AS isFeatured, b.created_at AS createdAt, b.updated_at AS updatedAt, c.name AS categoryName, COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username) AS authorName FROM t_blog b LEFT JOIN t_category c ON b.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_user u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.status = 1 AND (b.is_top = 1 OR b.is_featured = 1) ORDER BY b.is_top DESC, b.is_featured DESC, b.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, title, created_at AS createdAt FROM t_blog WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
